briefdescription.para: Secondary Boot Device (SBD) in IHT Attributes.
Below is the bit mapping of fields in the ATF Handoff parameters with that of Prtn header.

detaileddescription.para:
The number of bits shifted is is based on the difference between these two offsets ATFHandoffParams PrtnHdr Shift Parameter PrtnFlags PrtnAttrb difference
Exec State 0 3 3 right ENDIAN 1 18 17 right SECURE 2 0 2 left EL 3:4 1:2 2 left CPU_A72 5:6 8:10

briefdescription.para: Offset to the metaheader offset field present in boot header.
Boot header address in PRAM copied by ROM.
This function will return the value of A72 Execution State field.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Partition Header

briefdescription.para: This is the header file which contains versal specific definitions for the PDI.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 bm 07/06/2022 Initial release bm 09/13/2022 Reduce maximum number of partitions and images 1.01 har 11/17/2022 Added macros for bh_auth attribute in Bootheader ng 11/23/2022 Fixed doxygen file name error sk 01/11/2023 Added macro for Image Store as SBD 1.02 kpt 12/04/2023 Added XilPdi_BootHdr 2.01 mb 08/10/2024 Added macro for JTAG as SBD.
